Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.mediator.message

Class NewStarMessage

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.mediator.message.NewStarMessage
public class NewStarMessage extends Object
A message class containing new star type and information.

  • Constructor Details

    • NewStarMessage

      public NewStarMessage(NewStarType newStarType, StarInfo info, List<ValidObservation> obs, Map<SeriesType,List<ValidObservation>> obsCategoryMap, double minMag, double maxMag, String source)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      newStarType - The type of the new star.
      info - Information about the star's characteristics, e.g. designation, name, and possibly: period, epoch).
      obs - The list of valid observations for the loaded star.
      obsCategoryMap - A mapping from category (band, fainter-than) to observation.
      minMag - The minimum magnitude value for the dataset.
      maxMag - The maximum magnitude value for the dataset.
      source - The source of the dataset (may be null).
